title: ESIC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 17 Senior Resident, Specialist Posts
description: The Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 17 Senior Resident, Super Specialist, Medical Officer, and Specialist Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, MD/MS, DNB can apply for the ESIC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. H...
